summary: Full backend + frontend testing of High Square Aluminium showcase site. All major features working correctly.

issues: Cards 2 and 3 appear faded/low opacity in screenshot - likely framer-motion animation trigger issue on scroll

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well-structured and clean (<100 lines)
MongoDB _id excluded correctly in GET /api/contact using projection {'_id': 0}
CORS configured to use env var with fallback to '*' - acceptable for showcase site

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all sections render, mobile menu works, contact form submits and shows Thank You

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contact submissions via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 sections verified: Hero (dark theme, CTA buttons), Brand Statement, About (stats 25+, 1000+), Services (6 cards), Product Showcase (3 tabs), Why Choose Us (5 cards), Projects Gallery, Custom Solutions (3 cards), Contact Form (submits to /api/contact, shows Thank You), Footer (quick links, services, scroll-to-top). Mobile menu toggle works. Gold #D4AF37 theme applied correctly.
test_credentials: No auth required - pure showcase site
